_comment: Fabricated email data simulating real student inbox at VIT.

emails.subject: End Semester Exam Schedule Published
emails.body:
Dear Pratik Anand (23BRS1143),

The end semester examination schedule for Fall 2026 has been published on VTOP. Your first exam is on July 1st, 2026.

Please login to VTOP → Academics → Exam Schedule to view your personalized timetable.

Important: Hall ticket download will be available from June 25th.

Regards,
Controller of Examinations
VIT Vellore
emails.preview: End semester exam schedule for Fall 2026 published. First exam: July 1st. Download hall ticket from June 25th.

emails.subject: Microsoft Campus Drive - July 5th | SDE & PM Intern Roles
emails.body:
Dear Students,

Microsoft will be conducting a campus recruitment drive on July 5th, 2026.

Eligible Criteria:
- CGPA >= 8.0
- No active backlogs
- B.Tech CSE/IT/ECE branches

Roles Available:
1. Software Development Engineer Intern
2. Product Manager Intern

Registration Link: Superset Portal
Deadline: June 25th, 2026

Selection Process:
- Online Coding Test (June 28th)
- Technical Interview (2 rounds)
- HR Interview

Prepare well!

Regards,
TPO Office, VIT Vellore
emails.preview: Microsoft campus drive July 5th. CGPA >= 8.0 required. Register on Superset by June 25th. Roles: SDE Intern, PM Intern.

emails.subject: Overdue Book Reminder - CLRS
emails.body:
Dear Pratik,

This is a reminder that the following book is overdue:

Title: Introduction to Algorithms (CLRS) - 4th Edition
Due Date: June 10, 2026
Overdue by: 4 days
Fine: Rs. 5/day (Total: Rs. 20)

Please return the book to the Main Library, Ground Floor, Counter 2.

Regards,
VIT Central Library
emails.preview: CLRS book overdue by 4 days. Fine: Rs. 20. Return to Main Library Counter 2.

emails.subject: SIH 2026 - Team Registration Confirmed
emails.body:
Congratulations!

Your team 'Neural Knights' has been successfully registered for Smart India Hackathon 2026.

Team Details:
- Team Leader: Pratik Anand
- Members: Rahul M, Sneha R, Aditya K, Meera J, Vikram S

Problem statement allocation will be shared by June 22nd, 2026.

Next Steps:
1. Join the official SIH Discord server
2. Submit team photo by June 18th
3. Attend the orientation webinar on June 20th

Best wishes!
SIH 2026 Organizing Committee
emails.preview: Team 'Neural Knights' registered for SIH 2026. Problem statements by June 22nd. Orientation webinar June 20th.

emails.preview: Deep Learning Specialization certificate ready. Certificate ID: DL-2026-PA-4521.

emails.subject: Embedded Systems - Lab Exam Schedule & Preparation
emails.body:
Dear Students,

The Embedded Systems Lab Exam is scheduled for June 20th, 2026.

Timings:
- Batch 1 (Roll 1-30): 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM
- Batch 2 (Roll 31-60): 11:30 AM - 1:30 PM

Preparation:
- All 10 lab programs must be prepared
- Viva will cover: ARM architecture, GPIO, timers, interrupts, UART
- Bring your lab record (signed by TA)

No make-up exam will be conducted.

Best regards,
Prof. Venkatesh R
Department of CSE, VIT Vellore
emails.preview: Embedded Systems lab exam June 20th. All 10 programs required. Viva on ARM, GPIO, timers, interrupts.

emails.subject: Probability & Statistics - CAT 2 Results & FAT Preparation Guide
emails.body:
Dear Students,

CAT 2 results have been published on VTOP.

Class Statistics:
- Average: 28/50
- Highest: 47/50
- Your Score: Check VTOP

For FAT preparation, focus on:
1. Hypothesis Testing (Z-test, t-test, Chi-square)
2. Regression Analysis (Simple & Multiple)
3. ANOVA (One-way and Two-way)
4. Correlation & Covariance

Recommended: Solve Tutorial Sheet 7 and 8 problems.

Office Hours: Tuesday & Thursday, 3-5 PM, SJT 512.

Best regards,
Prof. Deepa M
emails.preview: CAT 2 results out. Class average 28/50. FAT focus: Hypothesis Testing, Regression, ANOVA. Office hours Tue/Thu 3-5 PM.

emails.subject: Round 2 Submission Reminder - Due June 18th
emails.body:
Hi Team Neural Knights,

This is a reminder that your Round 2 submission for Amazon Hackathon 2026 is due on June 18th, 2026.

Submission Requirements:
- Working prototype/demo video (max 5 min)
- Technical architecture document
- GitHub repository link
- Impact analysis document

Submit via: hackathon.amazon.com/submit

Good luck!
Amazon Hackathon Team
emails.preview: Amazon Hackathon Round 2 due June 18th. Need: demo video, architecture doc, GitHub repo, impact analysis.
